description:
Introduce an internal `SpecId(u32)` assigned during the typer pass. Convert eight `FnId.0`-keyed codegen structures to SpecId-indexed. Emit one Cranelift FuncId + Schema + Signature per specialization. Each Term::Call site dispatches to the matching FuncId.

## Concretely

Eight structures convert:
- `ModuleTypes` → `Vec<FnTypes>` indexed by SpecId
- `schemas: Vec<Schema>` → indexed by SpecId
- `fn_sigs: Vec<Signature>` → indexed by SpecId
- `fn_ids: HashMap<u32, FuncId>` → `Vec<FuncId>` indexed by SpecId (or `HashMap<SpecId, FuncId>` if churn)
- `fn_ptrs: HashMap<u32, *const u8>` → same
- `frame_sizes: Vec<u32>` → indexed by SpecId
- `return_descrs: Vec<Descr>` → indexed by SpecId
- `CompiledMetadata.schema_for(fn_id)` → `schema_for(spec_id)`

Plus one lookup map: `HashMap<(FnId, SpecKey), SpecId>`.

## SpecId ↔ schema_id

The runtime side keys on `schema_id` (opaque u32). SpecId maps directly to schema_id at registration time. The runtime's `SchemaRegistry` doesn't change shape — it just registers more schemas.

## Call site dispatch

At Term::Call (and TailCall, Term::Return into a cont), the caller has the arg-Descr tuple. Look up `(callee_fn_id, arg_tuple) → SpecId → FuncId`, emit the call against THAT FuncId. The callee's body has already been compiled per-specialization in the declare/compile loop.

## compile_fn

Called once per SpecId, with the matching FnTypes. The internal logic is unchanged — descr_is_int/float/atom quartet, schema lookup, BinOp typed fast paths, native ABI branching all consume FnTypes already.

## Acceptance

- Internal SpecId(u32) plumbed through the compile pipeline.
- Eight structures converted; no FnId.0 indexing in codegen except at the resolution boundary (callsite → SpecId lookup).
- Each (FnId, SpecKey) pair produces one declared FuncId.
- Term::Call / Term::TailCall sites dispatch to the right SpecId's FuncId.
- Fixture matrix green.
- CLIF for fact / dist / non-tail recursion fixtures shows narrowed monomorphic emission (fewer fz_alloc_float, fewer cont-frame allocations on typed flows).

## Risk

Specialization-set cardinality. If many fns are called with many distinct Descr tuples, code-size grows. Closures, Spawn, Receive collapse to the any-key (handled in .29.3); user-direct calls in practice tend toward few distinct tuples. Instrument and watch in this atom.

## Blocked by

fz-ul4.29.1.
title: .29.2: SpecId indirection + per-spec codegen
